entries.name: RustyMilk Sample Pack
entries.notes: RustyMilk-owned fixture pack used by CLI, SDK, player, and Studio integration tests.

entries.name: Butterchurn Presets 2.4.7
entries.notes: MIT-licensed converted Butterchurn preset package. Contains 1,754 converted JSON presets plus bundle files. This is not raw .milk source, but it is redistributable and useful for compatibility/import tooling.

entries.name: Milkdrop Cream of the Crop Presets
entries.notes: Large curated pack used by projectM. The upstream license note says most original preset authors did not publish explicit licenses. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds.

entries.name: Original MilkDrop Preset Pack
entries.notes: Original presets from the last official MilkDrop release. Repository has no explicit license file beyond README provenance. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds.

entries.name: MilkDrop Texture Pack
entries.notes: Textures originally released with MilkDrop plus common community textures. Repository has no explicit license file. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds.

entries.name: Classic projectM Preset Pack
entries.notes: Classic projectM preset collection published until projectM 3.1.12. Repository has no explicit license file. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds.

entries.name: En D Presets
entries.notes: Small En D preset collection. Upstream uses the same no-explicit-license/public-domain-assumption text as Cream of the Crop. Imported under the community-unlicensed policy for compatibility testing and opt-in builds.

entries.name: projectM Community Presets
entries.notes: Community preset submission repo. The default branch/content layout needs further review before any copy/link decision.

entries.name: MilkDrop3
entries.notes: Important compatibility reference for .milk2, sprites, saved images, shader injection, transitions, drag/drop, and saved state behavior. Treat presets/assets as link-only until license terms are confirmed.

entries.name: Milk Drop Preset Pack
entries.notes: Large historic preset pack. Needs license/provenance review before any redistribution.
